Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF AARON FELIX is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Parties have option to renew their request with the presiding judge during July 5, 2022 trial date.
